title: Checkbox Group
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Checkbox Group primitive preserving controlled multi-value group semantics, parent checkbox coordination, disabled/read-only/required/invalid states, root and checkbox data attributes, Space keyboard activation, and native checkbox form inputs without internal state.
distinguishes: Foldkit-native Base UI Checkbox Group primitive preserving controlled multi-value group semantics, parent checkbox coordination, disabled/read-only/required/invalid states, root and checkbox data attributes, Space keyboard activation, and native checkbox form inputs without internal state.

registry.reason: Checkbox Group preserves the local Base UI Checkbox checked, unchecked, indeterminate, ARIA, and data-attribute conventions for grouped items and parent controls.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, and predicate helpers for serializable options and activation payloads.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.
Origin Base UI React group primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Origin checkbox parts are represented by the existing local checkbox state conventions and the grouped Foldkit attributes.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Parent aria-controls uses caller-provided or group-derived stable IDs instead of runtime-generated React IDs.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit installable source is stateless and serializable. Stable caller-provided IDs preserve the public ARIA relationship without hidden runtime identity state.
